notes: Economic specialist Unique base — one instance on the map, sited on Plains, no terrain exception. Its one exclusive building is Stone Works (a Quarry-equivalent Resource building with a steeper compounding growth curve, mechanically the Stone counterpart to Harbour's Food pattern). Factory gives it the same roster as Capital; Harbour is only actually placeable if this base's site has a Water-adjacent Plains hex, same caveat as Capital's Harbour/Port. No specialty defense building — relies on generic Turret/Missile Launcher plus Walls (its sole offensive/defensive option beyond those is Factory). +100% Steel bonus is a building-scoped resourceModifiers entry on Mine (multiplier 2.0), stacking with Stone Works' own output to make this base a strong dual resource-economy target.
